title: RTM 15 July 2026 - Deterministic Semantic Pathway Supplement
scope: Non-gating deterministic pathway documented in the research note; not included in the locked A-J 9/9 statistical gate or reported sigma values.

exact_string.english_gloss: I know that reality updates retroactively

structural_note: The pathway terminates at 635, an already established core node represented in Closure family A by the exact phrase שש שלוש חמש (gematria 1584). That existing core branch then returns to 157 = 15|7. The final 635-to-157 relation is not counted as a new equation in this supplement.
